title: nephrodium spinulosum subsp. dilatatum
intro: Nephrodium spinulosum subsp. dilatatum, also known as the Dilatated Spiny Fern, is a subspecies of fern belonging to the family Matoniaceae. It is a vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating congestion. Nephrodium spinulosum subsp. dilatatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
